collection.name: HANSOME Genesis
collection.description: The Genesis collection of the HANSOME universe. Every alpaca is its own original individual — sharing the HANSOME look and feel, but with a unique wool shape, head silhouette, ear shape, expression, and fluff. They are NOT the mascot wearing different accessories.

mascotPolicy.rule: The canonical alpaca (mascotBase) is the official HANSOME mascot and the face of the brand. Its exact side-swept wool, head silhouette, ear shape, and expression are brand identity and are RESERVED. Exactly ONE NFT in the entire Genesis collection may use this exact appearance: the Founder NFT (#001).
generatorMustNever: use the mascot base for any token other than #001
produce a base body that replicates the mascot's exact wool shape / silhouette / ear / expression
treat the mascot as the generic base and only swap accessories

everyOtherAlpaca.mustStillReadAs: clearly the same HANSOME universe (shared palette, proportions, pixel-art rendering, cozy countryside identity)

distribution.notes: publicMint + legendary + reserved must equal totalSupply (470 + 20 + 10 = 500).

founder.label: Founder Alpaca
founder.notes: NFT #001 is hand-designed and is the ONLY token permitted to use the canonical mascot appearance (mascotBase). The generator must never produce or overwrite it.

legendaryTokenIds.notes: Exactly 20 Legendary NFTs, each individually hand-designed with its own identity. They are NOT random trait combinations. Their token IDs are pinned in legendaryAssignments before any random generation runs.

reservedTokenIds.notes: 10 reserved NFTs held back from the public generation pool. May be minted normally-generated or hand-picked, but their IDs are set aside up front so they can never accidentally land in the public 470.

randomPool.notes: Only these 470 are procedurally generated from the trait system. Founder (1), Legendary (20) and Reserved (10) IDs are removed from the candidate id set before generation.

layerNotes.base: The individual alpaca body for this token (from the 'base' category). Each is an original HANSOME alpaca with its own wool shape / head silhouette / ear / expression — NOT the mascot. Only token #001 uses the reserved mascot base. Base art is composited pixel-for-pixel, never smoothed or upscaled.
layerNotes.fur: Wool-style overlay drawn on top of the chosen base (tufts / texture / edge puffs). 'Classic' is a no-op.
layerNotes.necklace: Sits above clothing so a collar/pendant reads over a scarf or sweater.
layerNotes.effects: Ambient foreground elements (butterfly, bee, falling leaf, sparkles). Drawn last, may extend beyond the alpaca silhouette.

baseAnatomyContract.comment: So that hats/glasses/necklaces/etc. line up on every individual, all base-body variants share a common set of anatomy anchor points (crown, eye, ear, muzzle, mouth, neck, chest) within the tolerances below. Variation happens in wool/silhouette/ear/expression AROUND these anchors, not by moving them arbitrarily. Each base may also declare per-base anchor overrides.

anatomy.comment: Pixel coordinates on the 1024x1024 canvas. Originally derived from the mascot; used as the SHARED anchor contract that every base variant aligns to so traits fit naturally.

uniqueness.notes: No two public NFTs may share an identical trait combination. Founder and Legendary are outside this check.

outputs.metadata: NOT generated yet — explicitly out of scope until the trait library is approved.

status.notes: Only a small style-guide review batch has been drawn (5 hats, 5 glasses, 5 clothing, 5 necklaces, 5 backgrounds). Full library, metadata, and the 500-piece generation are on hold pending approval.
